response.justification: Strong 10+ years of full-stack experience directly aligned with current role at re:cinq; demonstrates TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, cloud platforms, and testing expertise. Currently delivering similar work in the target environment. Primary gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest not explicitly mentioned) rather than fundamental, and easily learnable given the depth of engineering background.
strengths: Currently in role at same company with direct TypeScript/Node.js/React stack match
10+ years diverse full-stack experience demonstrating ability to master multiple technologies
Strong testing and architecture mindset with proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing abilities
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement
Vitest and specific testing framework experience not detailed
Security and authentication best-practices not explicitly demonstrated in work examples

key_factors.factor: Current role alignment and company context
Exceeds seniority and experience breadth requirements
